_Comments._Note: PostgreSQL is the only supported persistent provider. Kiosk mode (Kiosk:Enabled=true) uses in-memory storage and ignores this connection string.

Kiosk._Comment: Enabled=true runs in-memory and auto-seeds demo data. Add Endpoint with a real provider/key/model to make Tracey chat and test runs hit a real LLM. BaseUrl, ApiKey and Model are required when Endpoint is present.

Proxy._Comment: Public base URL of the standalone ingestion proxy as reachable by clients. The UI advertises this as the OpenAI base_url (setup wizard, API-keys page). The Docker deployment sets it via PROXYTRACE_PROXY_PUBLIC_URL.

Updates._Comment: Daily check against the public release feed powering the admin 'update available' notice. Set Enabled=false to disable all outbound update-check requests.

Messaging._Comment: Provider=Redis for the proxy/app split; InProcess for single-process runs.

Search._Comment: Requests bounds the q/snippet length validation on the search API.

Statistics._Comment: Default and maximum page sizes for the dashboard statistics endpoint.

SecurityHeaders._Comment: Content-Security-Policy applied to API/SPA responses; DocsContentSecurityPolicy relaxes script-src for the bundled /docs manual.
SecurityHeaders.ContentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https:; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
SecurityHeaders.DocsContentSecurityPolicy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https:; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
